items.translation: В идеале был бы / были бы…
items.example: Ideally, there would be a park in the centre of the town.

items.phrase: The most important thing would be…
items.example: The most important thing would be to have clean water.
I'd probably choose a location near the mountains.

items.phrase: I'd go for a place that…
items.example: I'd go for a place that has mild weather.
It'd need to be somewhere with good soil for farming.

items.phrase: They'd need to be able to…
items.example: They'd need to be able to grow their own food.
What would be essential is a reliable source of water.

items.translation: Жизнь была бы лучше, если бы…
items.example: Life would be better if there was less traffic.
